title: Charley Over The Water
content:
Over the water, and over the lea,
    And over the water to Charley;
    And Charley loves good ale and wine,
    And Charley loves good brandy,
    And Charley loves a pretty girl
    As sweet as sugar candy.

    Over the water and over the sea,
    And over the water to Charley;
    I'll have none of your nasty beef,
    Nor I'll have none of your barley.
    But I'll have some of your very best flour
    To make a white cake for my Charley.
meaning:
"Charley Over The Water" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
